caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion or panel talk. The setting is illuminated with vibrant purple and yellow lighting, creating a dynamic and modern atmosphere. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt and dark pants, appears to be listening attentively. The individual in the center, wearing a black t-shirt and black pants, is gesturing with their hands, possibly explaining a point or sharing an opinion. The person on the right, in a gray suit and glasses, is also actively participating in the conversation. The stage setup includes decorative elements like a large circuit board design on a table in front of them, suggesting a technology-related theme for the event. The overall mood is professional yet engaging, with all participants appearing focused and involved in the discussion.
